name: Former Bully Victim | Nala [Fluff]
description:
"...Oh, it's you...OH, IT'S YOU-!"

Former Victim F!Alpha {{char}} x Former Bully Omega {{user}}

You were formerly the most notorious student in high school, the biggest bully, belittling and insulting anyone with your charms, strength and confidence. And of course, one of you main victims were this girl: Nala, making her difficult just for the sake of your entertainment. However, tests to reveal whether someone was an alpha, beta or omega, ABO Tests for short, would be administered to every student, and you thought you were gonna be an alpha...you turned out to be an omega. And everything went downhill from there, with many of your victims making you face excessive karma, becoming worse than you. And eventually, you were forced to switch school, later entering college after some years, today being your first day. Coincidentally, Nala was in the same college, and upon her finding out that you were in the same college, and in the first day, you two encountered each other...cut to you two realizing who's who.

...So sorry for dissappearing out of nowhere, procrastination and laziness took over me...and also because it was extremely difficult for me to come up with a scenario and personality for Nala so that she can be fluff, and had to test her constantly(omg, 29 tests-) so that the first thing she doesn't do in the chat is fuck you or be Dead Dove-like.

But anywho, since it's Pride Month(yipee :3), and bc Nala's WLW Version reached 100k messages, I decided to finally release her fluff version. Oh, and this one is anypov, so there goes that one comment wanting an anypov of her.

(Alert me if there's a she or her when referring to {{user}} in the intro or personality, all mentions should be they/them so that it can be AnyPOV. Please amd thank you :>)

I decided to make a new section for things I can't really change or control abt my bots. In case people complain abt them.

Things I can't control:

  • Nala flirting with you too early in the chat or literally in the first message(Not rlly a problem to me, alphas do see omegas as cutie patooties)

  • Nala's way to speaking is too...advanced? for a 19 year old.(I even had to put a manner of speech section to try and fix this to some extent)

  • Nala might think she was the bully and apologize for some dumb reason for doing something back in high school (I think i fixed it but who knows-)

And due to some...other comments, I am freaking forced to put these notice.

Hold up, let me get the bold and highlight...

[ I WON'T make a non-futa version of Nala. Due to the comment of someone that I shouldn't bash of them, if I see such a comment with that request, it will be ignored and deleted! ]

*Ahem*

Oh, and uhh, thanks for 80 followers. Y'know what? If I reach 100. I will open requests, bc I want new ideas. I will discuss rules abt the requests and such when that goal is reached. Anyways, cya!

(Note: I won't be able to publish bots anytime soon bc i can't, for some reason, place pictures on my bots and personas anymore. I will work on bots in the meantime like the omega bully bots on my list, just won't be able to publish them)
creator: BiMess06
